n1.title: Regional Qualifiers 2026
n1.subtitle: Our start competing in Stem Racing in 2026
paragraph:
14th of February 2026.

 We competed in the regional qualifiers for Stem Racing 2026. The event was held at the institute of mechatronics in Sesto San Giovanni, Italy. We had a great time competing against other teams and showcasing our car.

The first competition only comprehended the engineering exposition and portfolio presentation and the actual race on track. Thanks to the hard work of the team we managed to qualify for the Regional Finals, which will be held in May 2026.

n2.title: Our Visit to PoliTo
n2.subtitle: We met with the Formula Student team of Politecnico di Torino
paragraph:
20th of February 2026.

 We had the opportunity to visit the Formula Student team of Politecnico di Torino. We had a great time learning about their car and sharing our experiences in Stem Racing.

During our visit the members of the team showed us around their facilities and their car on display. Since some of the members of Formula Student's team have similar roles to some of our members we had the opportunity to learn from more experienced competitors.
The visit was a great opportunity to network with other teams and learn from their experiences.

n3.title: Showcase of our Car Pacchiotti Institute
n3.subtitle: With the imitation of the track that we built we showed our progress to our school
paragraph:
17th of April 2026.

 We organized a showcase of our car for the students and teachers of our school. We built an imitation of the track and we sent the car on it with a CO2 cartridge. We had a great time showing our progress to our school and we received a lot of support from the students and teachers.

n4.title: Self-Managed day at our school
n4.subtitle: We organized some activities for the students of our school during the self-managed day
paragraph:
23rd and 24th of April 2026.

 We organized some activities for the students of our school during the self-managed day. We had a great time showing our car and explaining our project to the students. We also organized some games and activities related to Stem Racing.
